docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-17-1998 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-17-1998, OFF CALENDAR NOV 17,1998 POS OSC.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-11-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY THOMAS I SABERI. HEARING SET FOR JAN-20-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-20-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY THOMAS I SABERI, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-04-1999 CONTINUED FROM JAN-20-1999 TO MAR-10-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF SABEK, INC.

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-10-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-10-1999, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF SABEK, INC.

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-28-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-28-1999, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND OBTAIN JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL THOMAS SABERI WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-13-1999 CONTINUED FROM APR-28-1999 TO JUN-23-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-23-1999, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSED ON 6-22-99.
